title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: Announcements
text:
| 29/08/2020 | 30/09/2020 | |
| Notification for last date for submission of bid for Old RMS Chomuhani Foreign Liquior Shop No 2 | Notification for last date for submission of bid for Old RMS Chomuhani Foreign Liquior Shop No 2, Old RMS Chowmuhani, Agartala is hereby extended upto 10-08-2020 at 05.30 PM | 30/07/2020 | 10/08/2020 | |
| Notice Inviting Tender (2nd Call) for the Settlement of Retail Vend of Old RMS Chowmuhani Foreign Liquor Shop No 2 | Notice Inviting Tender (2nd Call) for the Settlement of Retail Vend of Old RMS Chowmuhani Foreign Liquor Shop No 2, Agartala | 10/07/2020 | 31/07/2020 | |
| Order Under Section 144 Cr.P C Dated 11/07/2020 Some Modification on Curfew Condition | Order Under Section 144 Cr.P C some modification on curfew condition | 11/07/2020 | 31/07/2020 | |
| Contractual Engagement letter of Multi Tasking Staff | Contractual Engagement letter of Multi Tasking Staff on purely contract basis . | 18/07/2020 | 31/07/2020 | |
| Contractual Engagement letter of Technical Assistant | Contractual Engagement letter of Technical Assistant on purely contract basis. | 18/07/2020 | 31/07/2020 | |
